Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8220 "FASTEDDIE-1000-8220" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fast Eddie (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 which copies 512 bytes of data from $1030 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then sets the stack pointer to $F4 and jumps to the entry point at $8220 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack).
